name: Thai Ham and Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 capsicum pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil and prepare a bowl of ice-cold water.
2. Plunge the shredded cabbage into the boiling water for one minute, then transfer it to the cold water.
3. Drain and dry the cabbage thoroughly. Arrange the vegetables in sections or concentric rings on a large serving dish for maximum visual appeal.
4. Place the chicken and ham in the center of the arrangement.
5. (Optional) Garnish the dish with bright red chili "flowers." To make these, slit long, thin hot chilies lengthwise near the stem attachment point. Toss the slits in a bowl of ice water and cubes. The petals will curl back, creating an attractive garnish. Make about eight slits.
6. Serve the dressing separately for passing to guests.
